diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How may I assist you today?
[Caller] Hi, I bought the Welkin Moon twice in the same day by mistake. Can I get one refunded?
[Agent] I can look into that. For security, could you provide your UID?
[Caller] 832118007.
[Agent] Thank you. And to verify identity, could you confirm the HoYoverse email on file?
[Caller] ytanaka at email dot com.
[Agent] Verified. Could you provide the Order IDs for both Welkin purchases?
[Caller] ORD202604200004 is the one I want to keep. The other one, let me find it. ORD202604200005.
[Agent] Thank you. I see both orders, 4.99 USD each, same day April 20th. Per the Welkin Moon duplicate-purchase policy, if both were purchased within 24 hours on the same UID and only one has been activated, the unactivated one is eligible for a full refund. I am checking activation status now.
[Caller] Okay.
[Agent] Order ORD202604200005 has not been activated. Per policy I am processing a full refund of 4.99 USD to the original payment method. Refund reference CMP9922. Funds will return in 5 to 7 business days. Please also note that once refunded, that Welkin Moon cannot be re-activated on this account.
[Caller] That's fine. Thank you.
[Agent] Anything further?
[Caller] No, that's all.
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. Have a good day.
